heading: Criminal penalty
label: 1519 Criminal penalty
text: An officer or employee of the United States Government or of the District of Columbia government knowingly and willfully violating shall be fined not more than $5,000, imprisoned for not more than 2 years, or both.section 1517(a) of this title
